evals.prompt: I have this idea for an AI tool that helps real estate agents write property descriptions. I think it could be big but I'm not sure where to start. How do I validate if anyone would actually pay for this?
evals.expected_output: Phase-specific coaching for validation: should recommend problem research (forums, Reddit) and customer discovery interviews with real estate agents. Should NOT dump all 5 phases.

assertions.name: diagnoses-phase-1
assertions.text: Correctly identifies user is in Phase 1 (Validation) and focuses advice there

assertions.name: recommends-research-first
assertions.text: Recommends doing problem research on forums/Reddit/communities before building anything

assertions.name: recommends-customer-interviews
assertions.text: Recommends customer discovery interviews with real estate agents

assertions.name: warns-against-building-first
assertions.text: Warns against jumping straight to building before validation

assertions.name: does-not-dump-all-phases
assertions.text: Does NOT dump all 5 phases at once - stays focused on current phase

assertions.name: tool-agnostic
assertions.text: Suggests tool categories rather than mandating specific tools

assertions.name: mentions-no-pitching-rule
assertions.text: Warns not to talk about the product during customer interviews

evals.prompt: I validated my idea by talking to 9 people — 3 groups of 3. Turns out fitness coaches really need help with client meal plans. 6 out of 9 said they'd pay. What's my next step?
evals.expected_output: Should identify user has completed Phase 1 and route to Phase 2 (Launch). Should recommend turning the idea into an irresistible offer, getting a domain, building a landing page with direct response copy, and starting outreach immediately.

assertions.name: diagnoses-phase-2
assertions.text: Correctly identifies user should move to Phase 2 (Launch) since validation is done

assertions.name: recommends-offer-first
assertions.text: Recommends creating an offer/landing page BEFORE building the product

assertions.name: mentions-domain-strategy
assertions.text: Mentions getting a domain as an early step

assertions.name: mentions-direct-response-copy
assertions.text: Recommends landing page copy written like a direct response marketer or conversion-focused

assertions.name: recommends-parallel-outreach
assertions.text: Recommends starting outreach immediately, in parallel with building

evals.prompt: I built a prototype of my AI scheduling assistant using Bolt. A few friends tried it and said it's cool but I have zero paying customers. What should I do next?
evals.expected_output: Should identify user is between Phase 3 and 4 (has MVP but no revenue). Should push toward monetization: find 5 paying customers through outreach, choose a business model, offer early adopter discount. Should NOT suggest more building.

assertions.name: diagnoses-monetization-phase
assertions.text: Correctly identifies user needs to focus on monetization (Phase 4), not more building

assertions.name: recommends-finding-paying-customers
assertions.text: Recommends finding first 5 paying customers through outreach

assertions.name: warns-against-more-building
assertions.text: Warns against continuing to build features before getting revenue

assertions.name: suggests-pricing-strategy
assertions.text: Suggests a pricing or business model strategy (e.g., early adopter discount)

assertions.name: recommends-direct-outreach
assertions.text: Recommends direct outreach as the primary channel (not SEO/content)

assertions.name: warns-not-to-charge-friends
assertions.text: Warns against charging existing friends/beta users — go find new paying customers

evals.prompt: My AI content repurposing tool is making about $3k/month from 20 customers I found through cold email. How do I scale this to $30k/month?
evals.expected_output: Should identify user is in Phase 5 (Growth). Should recommend the growth trifecta: scale outreach, add organic content (LinkedIn), then paid retargeting. Should also mention automation of operations.

assertions.name: diagnoses-growth-phase
assertions.text: Correctly identifies user is in Phase 5 (Growth) with product-market fit signals

assertions.name: recommends-growth-trifecta
assertions.text: Recommends at least 2 of the 3 growth trifecta channels: outreach at scale, organic content, paid retargeting

assertions.name: mentions-organic-content
assertions.text: Specifically recommends organic content creation (especially LinkedIn for B2B)

assertions.name: mentions-automation
assertions.text: Mentions automating operations to handle scale

assertions.name: builds-on-existing-success
assertions.text: Acknowledges cold email is working and advises scaling it, not abandoning it

assertions.name: sequential-not-simultaneous
assertions.text: Recommends building growth channels in sequence, not all at once

evals.prompt: I've been doing tons of research for 3 weeks and I think I've found the perfect market. I'm ready to start coding my app this weekend. What stack should I use?
evals.expected_output: Should catch that user is trying to skip Phase 2 (Launch). Should redirect: before building, create an offer and landing page, start talking to potential customers, get a domain. Research is done but launch comes before build.

assertions.name: catches-phase-skip
assertions.text: Catches that user is trying to skip from Phase 1 directly to Phase 3 (skipping Launch)

assertions.name: redirects-to-launch
assertions.text: Redirects user to Phase 2: create an offer and landing page before building

assertions.name: warns-against-premature-building
assertions.text: Warns against building before having an offer in front of customers

assertions.name: does-not-answer-tech-stack
assertions.text: Does NOT get into tech stack discussion — that's not the priority right now

evals.prompt: I launched my MVP 2 months ago and have 3 customers paying $29/month. I want to start running Facebook ads and creating YouTube content to grow faster.
evals.expected_output: Should identify user is in early Phase 4/5 transition but with weak PMF signals (only 3 customers). Should advise getting to 5 customers first through direct outreach before investing in paid ads or content. SEO/YouTube take too long at this stage.

assertions.name: identifies-weak-pmf
assertions.text: Identifies that 3 customers is not strong enough PMF to invest in growth channels

assertions.name: warns-against-slow-channels
assertions.text: Warns against YouTube/content marketing as too slow for this stage (6-12 months to results)

assertions.name: recommends-outreach-first
assertions.text: Recommends continuing direct outreach to hit 5+ paying customers before expanding channels

assertions.name: recommends-retargeting-not-cold-ads
assertions.text: If paid ads are discussed, recommends retargeting warm audiences over cold ads
